name: How much is my ladder fall at work case worth?
description: $20K-$500K+ depending on injuries and fault; lawyer assesses.[2]

mainEntity.name: How much is my ladder fall at work case worth?

acceptedAnswer.text: $20K-$500K+ depending on injuries and fault; lawyer assesses.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Case value ranges $20K-$500K+ based on injury severity, lost wages, and liability; fractures average $50K, spinal $150K+.[1][2]

Factors include medical costs, work impact, and pain; third-party claims increase via full damages.[3]

- Mild: $20K-50K.
- Severe/paralysis: $300K+.
- Add future care.

Get a free evaluation from a specialist; track all losses accurately.[2] Settlements vary by state.
